name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions a hardened Nginx reverse proxy serving three SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local) with self-signed certificate generation, security hardening via fail2ban and UFW firewall, SSH daemon hardening, and kernel-level sysctl tuning.

name: cache
description: Configures a dual caching layer with Memcached (via the community memcached cookbook) and Redis (via the community redisio cookbook) with password authentication, including a post-install ruby_block workaround to strip deprecated Redis config directives.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application cloned from a public GitHub repository, including PostgreSQL database provisioning, Python virtual environment setup, pip dependency installation, .env file creation with database credentials, and systemd service management.
